title: MoneyMake
description: A Vault addon, you can sell gold to make money
body:
# What is this plugin about?

Well, using the **Vault plugin**, and some other economy dependency,
**You can sell gold ingots, (Enchanted) Gold Apples, Gold Nuggets and Gold Blocks**

# Whats special about this plugin

Its not very special, **but in the config you can set the prices of the gold stuff!**

# DEPENDENCIES!
## Vault

[https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/)

**_Any kind of economy plugin for Vault_**

## CoinsEngine

[https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/coinsengine-%E2%AD%90-economy-and-custom-currencies.84121/](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/coinsengine-%E2%AD%90-economy-and-custom-currencies.84121/)
